text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the Tokyo Racecourse to check out
promising Umamusume making their debuts, when
out of nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: UWAAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You all did amazing in your debut! I'm sooo
touched!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering what the racket was about...
Figures it'd be you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! Were you watching too, Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It was their first race... Yet they ran their hearts
out, without bending or breaking under the
pressure...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's just so HEARTWARMIIIING!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Quit it with the waterworks, already. This is a rite
of passage for every racer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Exactly! That's why it's so special!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
M-m-my heart feels like it's gonna burst out of my
chest! Wh-what was that charm that helps you get
rid of nerves again?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Eurgh... If I'm like this for my debut race, how am I
ever going to get through the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I managed to calm down a little, but the moment I
saw that turf my mind went blank!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see someone up for their debut, I'm
swept back into that moment!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Not everyone feels the same as you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waah—huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
"Just run." That's what was going through my head
during my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Even thinking back on it now, it doesn't feel like a
big deal to me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh, we had really different experiences!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...But what came after is the same, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, we both wanted to run faster and race with
a rival in a G1 event. Both of us also experienced
that desire to win and the frustration of losing.
And of course, we wanted to make our dreams
come true!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All those hopes and dreams built us up. Every
hurdle we faced made us stronger!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's how we felt, and I bet the debuting racers
feel the same!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You might be right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully one day, some of them will become
powerful enough to sate my hunger.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm sure you'll have tons of rivals coming
your way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's at the starting line, racing toward their
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... Some things never change.
